title: Keep register-user domain types pure
scenario: Domain types should not depend on HTTP, JSON, databases, or logging setup. Start with pure command and value-object types.
instructions: Define a domain module with EmailAddress and RegisterUserCommand. Keep fields private and expose borrowed accessors.

hints.body: Inside the domain module, define EmailAddress and RegisterUserCommand with private fields.
Add constructors plus borrowed accessors: EmailAddress::as_str, RegisterUserCommand::email, and RegisterUserCommand::display_name.
One complete solution for Keep register-user domain types pure is shown below.

completionExplanation: The register-user command now lives in the domain layer with private data and borrowed accessors, so adapter and infrastructure concerns stay outside the domain model.
